---
title: "Resume"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
---
<a href="GraceEvansResume.pdf" download class="download-btn">
  <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 16 16">
    <path d="M.5 9.9a.5.5 0 0 1 .5.5v2.5a1 1 0 0 0 1 1h12a1 1 0 0 0 1-1v-2.5a.5.5 0 0 1 1 0v2.5a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H2a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-2.5a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5z"/>
    <path d="M7.646 11.854a.5.5 0 0 0 .708 0l3-3a.5.5 0 0 0-.708-.708L8.5 10.293V1.5a.5.5 0 0 0-1 0v8.793L5.354 8.146a.5.5 0 1 0-.708.708l3 3z"/>
  </svg>
  Download PDF
</a>

<style>
.download-btn {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  padding: 8px 16px;
  background-color: #2c7be5;
  color: white;
  border-radius: 6px;
  text-decoration: none;
  font-weight: 500;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}
.download-btn:hover {
  background-color: #1a68d1;
  color: white;
}
</style>

::: {.my-bubble}
## Education
* **College of William & Mary** | B.A. International Relations; Minor in Data Science
* **Raymond A. Mason School of Business** | M.S. Business Analytics (Accepted)
:::

::: {.my-bubble}
## Skills & Certificates
* **Programming:** Python, R, SQL
* **Languages:** Spanish (Advanced), Dutch (Proficient)
* Teaching English as a Foreign Language (TEFL) Certification
* Collaborative Institutional Training Initiative (CITI) Certification
* UPenn Wharton (Coursera) Business Foundations Specialization
:::

::: {.my-bubble}
## Work Experience
### Research Assistant | Digital Inclusion & Governance Lab

##### August 2025 -- Present

* Conduct policy-relevant research on a collaborative student-faculty team to evaluate the impacts and uses of digital technologies
* Translate research findings on GenAI into actionable financial literacy programs and policy insights – primarily in Southeast Africa

### Research Fellow | Comisión Provincial por la Memoria

##### June 2025 -- August 2025

* Worked on the Research and Archives team at an autonomous government-commissioned agency, leading an initiative to expand its
register of victims and acts of state violence that took place during Argentina’s last dictatorship
* Collaborated with fellow researchers, analyzed declassified archival documents, conducted data collection and synthesized findings
into a comprehensive database – all while improving Spanish linguistic and reading skills in a professional setting

### Intern | Partnership to Advance Responsible Technology (P.A.R.T.)

##### May 2024 – January 2025

* Developed a K-12 digital literacy curriculum that encompasses tech-focused hard and soft skills including podcast-creation,
responsible research/writing, netiquette, and technology governance
* Conducted research on emerging grant opportunities and assisted with the application process, leveraging philanthropic support to
fund forward-looking responsible technology initiatives
* Employed digital marketing and media skills through managing the website, LinkedIn, Twitter, and Instagram accounts, to
strategically network and collaborate with local, national, and global organizations in reciprocal fields

### Intern | Kids Learning Community (KLC)

##### May 2024 -- June 2024

* Utilized TEFL degree and acquired skills to design lessons, train program volunteers, and teach English to students ages 3-13 in
Nuevo Arenal, Costa Rica
* Managed administrative operations, employing linguistic Spanish skills to forge relationships with local non-profits and initiatives,
and better embed KLC into the community
* Directed digital marketing and media operations through managing the website and Facebook account

### Intern/Volunteer | Urban Impact

##### July 2023 -- August 2023

* Worked within the marketing team of Christian non-profit to organize student events, camps, and general affairs while completing
administrative office tasks
* Expanded my vision of local fellowship by building relationships with youth (ages 12-17) in Pittsburgh’s underserved community
and utilizing social media to showcase their skills

### Intern | Metz Lewis Brodman Must O’Keefe LLC

##### July 2022 -- August 2022

* Led an organizational initiative to aid attorneys in accessing their files and in accordance with the order of legal proceedings
* Shadowed commercial litigators through tasks of reviewing legal process documents, participating in litigation team strategy
meetings, and attending client conferences
:::

::: {.my-bubble}
## Entrepreneurship, Leadership, & Mentoring
### International Relations Student Ambassador | William & Mary

##### June 2025 -- Present

* Promote and represent William & Mary’s International Relations program to current, prospective, and undecided students, speaking
at and participating in events such as Day for Admitted Students, Majors Week, and the Undergraduate Research Opportunities Fair

### Spanish Tutor | Self-Employed

##### February 2020 -- Present

* Leverage my passion for Spanish language and culture to train struggling students, create engaging speaking and writing activities,
expand students’ vocabularies, and improve students’ performance and grades

### Panel Moderator | The Global Impact Forum Summit

##### September 2024

* Moderated the AI For Good panel at the inaugural Penn State University summit centered around leveraging AI as a critical tool in
forging innovation, cross-sector partnerships, and ultimately, greater well-being

### Founder | Friends From Afar

###### September 2021 -- June 2023

* Founded a cross-cultural pen-pal program to facilitate friendships between middle-school students in Pittsburgh and Nairobi, Kenya
* Led weekly virtual meetings on youth networking/outreach, and the importance of developing global perspectives
:::

::: {.my-bubble}
## Memberships
* International Relations Club (2023 – Present)
* Alexander Hamilton Society (2023 – Present)
* Kappa Kappa Gamma (2023 - Present)
:::
